title: BigQuery Schema Guardrails

hero.subtitle: From raw data file to governed, production-ready schema automatically.
hero.hook: From raw data to ready schema instantly. Design once. Govern forever.
hero.oneLiner: What used to take half a day of manual work now takes seconds - and it never breaks downstream.

overview: A governed schema automation framework designed for enterprise-grade BigQuery ingestion pipelines. Provide a sample file like CSV, JSON, Avro, or Parquet and it automatically generates a production-ready BigQuery schema with recommended partitioning and clustering strategies, along with multiple standardized outputs including BigQuery CREATE TABLE DDL, BigQuery JSON schema, Migration DDL (for schema evolution), YAML configuration files, and explainable documentation for schema understanding.

howItWorks.title: Auto-Infer Schema
howItWorks.detail: Data types, nullability mode, STRUCT/RECORD fields, nested schemas, timestamps

howItWorks.title: Apply Intelligence
howItWorks.detail: Partitioning, clustering, governance metadata, PII detection

howItWorks.title: Validate & Register
howItWorks.detail: BigQuery validation and schema registry integration

howItWorks.title: Output Ready
howItWorks.detail: DDL, JSON schema, YAML, docs generated

forEngineers: Auto-generates BigQuery DDLs, JSON schemas, YAML configs, migration scripts, and documentation from a single sample file

Uses deterministic SHA-256 schema fingerprinting for order-independent drift detection, breaking/non-breaking change classification, automatic versioning, and configurable Auto, Warn, and Strict enforcement modes
Maintains immutable schema registry with automatic versioning and complete schema history
Automatically suggests optimal partitioning strategies using timestamp analysis, ingestion-time fallback logic, and volume-aware heuristics
Intelligent clustering recommendations using distinct ratio analysis, null ratio evaluation, naming heuristics, and query access patterns
Advanced naming normalization for clean, standardized, BigQuery-compliant schemas
Adds enterprise-ready metadata fields including record timestamps, change tracking, and soft delete support.
Built-in BigQuery schema validation with automatic compliance checks and error handling
Identifies sensitive fields and suggests security classifications for governance readiness
forBusiness: Eliminates manual schema design, accelerating onboarding for new data sources
Reduces downstream failures caused by schema mismatches and structural errors
Built-in governance with version control, data tracking, and sensitive data classification.
Optimized partitioning and clustering help reduce BigQuery query costs automatically
Designed to integrate seamlessly with other accelerators in the suite.
Immutable schema registry ensures complete version tracking and change visibility

title: TagGuard

hero.subtitle: From detection to protection automatically. No blind spots. No data leaks.
hero.hook: Scan once. Protect always. Govern continuously.
hero.oneLiner: What once required weeks of manual compliance work now runs automatically every day, without anyone asking.

overview: A cloud-native data governance accelerator that extends Google Cloud DLP from detection to full enforcement, delivering a complete end-to-end PII protection workflow across BigQuery and GCS. It discovers and scans BigQuery tables and GCS files for sensitive data, automates PII detection, tagging, and masking, and provides continuous monitoring with drift detection, audit tracking, and automated alerts. Not just a scanner, a complete protection pipeline.
forEngineers: Supports scheduled and event-driven DLP scans with priority-based orchestration and parallel execution strategies
Incremental scanning detects only new or changed assets using change detection, significantly reducing sensitive data discovery and DLP scanning costs
Detects standard PII, region-specific identifiers, and custom regex-based sensitive data patterns for scalable data classification
Intelligent false-positive reduction using thresholds, allow lists, exception handling, and reusable DLP detection templates
Automatically applies policy tags, metadata-driven governance, and dynamic data masking while preserving existing security controls
Detects schema, policy, masking, and metadata drift with structured monitoring alerts and compliance visibility
DLQ and review workflows ensure reliable failure handling, audit logging, and end-to-end traceability
Supports dry-run and apply modes with quota-aware execution, operational resilience, and emergency bypass controls
forBusiness: Continuous automated compliance scanning across BigQuery and GCS - no manual audit efforts required
Complete visibility into where sensitive data exists across the data ecosystem
Reduces breach risk through automated detection, masking, and enforcement workflows
Incremental and cost-optimized scanning minimizes DLP processing costs on large datasets
Preserves existing governance controls and prevents accidental security downgrades
Structured alerts and monitoring provide full visibility into drift, masking, and operational issues

title: StreamFlow

hero.subtitle: Real-time data you can trust. No data loss. No delays. Just insights.
hero.hook: Every event captured. Every record delivered. Nothing left behind.
hero.oneLiner: What used to mean lost data during outages now means zero events missed, ever.

overview: A production-ready real-time streaming ingestion framework that processes and delivers event data from Pub/Sub into BigQuery with high reliability and scalability. Designed to handle schema inference and enforcement, data validation, deduplication, late-arriving data, DLQ, and backfill - ensuring pipelines are accurate, resilient, and enterprise-ready from day one.

howItWorks.title: Store Raw Data
howItWorks.detail: Raw events stored in GCS for recovery and replay

howItWorks.title: Route & Deliver
howItWorks.detail: Records routed to BigQuery Main, DLQ, late-data/ replay tables

howItWorks.title: Monitor & Replay
howItWorks.detail: Metrics, alerts, lineage, replay, and backfill support

forEngineers: Avro schema validation with dynamic schema updates, continuous drift detection, and automatic BigQuery schema evolution without pipeline restarts
Dataflow-based streaming architecture with Pub/Sub ingestion, auto-scaling workers, backlog-aware processing, and workload balancing
Configuration-driven pipelines with customizable validation, replay, routing, schema enforcement, and source-specific processing rules
Raw data backup to GCS with structured DLQ handling and retry mechanisms
Stateful deduplication with TTL windows, latest-event-wins logic, and out-of-order event handling
Watermark-based late data routing with replay workflows and reconciliation tracking
At-least-once delivery guarantees with exponential backoff retries and replay-ready recovery architecture
Advanced data normalization for nulls, numeric formats, timestamps, and multi-encoding support
Auto-scaling streaming architecture with workload balancing and real-time operational metrics
Centralized configuration, audit logging, access control, ordered processing, and end-to-end lineage tracking
forBusiness: Zero data loss with raw event backup and full backfill capability at any time
Reliable real-time pipelines with accurate, gap-free, duplicate-free analytics
Built-in SLA alerts and anomaly monitoring for complete operational visibility
Late-arriving events are automatically routed and replayed to maintain data accuracy
Auto-scaling architecture handles growing enterprise streaming workloads seamlessly
Reduces engineering effort through automated schema handling, retries, deduplication, and replay management

title: FileFlow

hero.subtitle: Data pipelines reimagined through intelligence. Every record validated. Every load succeeds.
hero.hook: Enterprise files arrive messy. Your warehouse doesn't have to.
hero.oneLiner: What used to mean a week of custom loader development now means hours to production.

overview: A metadata-aware, schema-intelligent, resilient ingestion framework that automatically validates, transforms, governs, and lands source files from GCS into BigQuery with production-grade reliability. From raw file arrival to trusted warehouse delivery - in hours, not weeks. Supported File Formats: CSV · JSON · Avro · Parquet · ORC · Compressed Files

howItWorks.title: File Lands in GCS
howItWorks.detail: Raw file arrives in landing bucket

howItWorks.title: Schema + Quality
howItWorks.detail: Headers, data types, duplicates, corrupted files validation

howItWorks.title: Transform & Cleanse
howItWorks.detail: Standardize, dedup, align to BQ structure

howItWorks.title: BigQuery Table Load
howItWorks.detail: MERGE or APPEND with operational metadata

forEngineers: Supports CSV, JSON, Avro, Parquet, and ORC with configuration-driven ingestion, customizable validation rules, and metadata-based orchestration per source pipeline
Cloud Function and Composer-triggered orchestration with parameter extraction, checkpoint creation, and automated Dataflow job execution
Auto schema detection, column name normalization, duplicate header resolution, data type inference, null and type validation per file
Built-in corruption detection, compressed file handling, infrastructure validation, and poison record detection before ingestion
Deduplication engine, poison record detection applied before any BigQuery write
Smart MERGE/APPEND automation - accelerator selects the right BigQuery load strategy per table configuration; schema version registry tracks drift and evolves new fields without pipeline breaks
Automated file validation and standardization handles headers, schema mismatches, duplicate columns, nulls, invalid types, and malformed records through the built-in validation framework
Raw-to-processed bucket lifecycle management with replay-ready storage and full backfill support
Per-file audit log: filename, row count, load timestamp, status - full traceability; DLQ support ensure no file silently fails; raw storage enables full backfill
Dataflow-based scalable batch processing with workload parallelization, monitoring metrics, alerting, and environment-aware deployment controls
forBusiness: Rapidly onboard new data sources from raw files to production-ready warehouse ingestion
Built-in validation prevents malformed files and schema issues from reaching BigQuery
Eliminates repetitive ingestion coding through config-driven source onboarding
Ensures trusted, auditable and analytics-ready batch datasets
Scales seamlessly as new file feeds and data sources are added
Enterprise-grade reliability and monitored execution

title: DAGmatic

hero.subtitle: From pipeline idea to production DAG - in one governed flow.
hero.hook: Automation that understands dependencies. Pipelines that validate themselves.
hero.oneLiner: What used to take a week of Airflow coding now takes minutes from YAML.

overview: A production-grade DAG automation framework that converts YAML configs, metadata, SQL logic, python logic and pipeline definitions into fully standardized, enterprise-ready DAG’s for Composer. Zero manual DAG coding - define workflows in YAML; the accelerator handles schema validation, dependency graph analysis, cycle detection, branch annotation, Jinja rendering, and direct Composer deployment. Eliminates manual DAG coding and standardizes orchestration across ingestion, transformation, validation, and operational workflows.

howItWorks.title: Graph Analysis
howItWorks.detail: Cycle detection, Branch annotation, dependency validation

forEngineers: Zero-code DAG creation using YAML configurations and pre-built and custom pipeline templates - no Airflow Python coding required
Intelligent YAML validation with detailed error explanations and fix suggestions using strict schema enforcement
Advanced dependency validation detects circular references, missing tasks, and invalid dependency chains automatically
Smart branch annotation automatically classifies workflow patterns and builds dependency flows
External SQL and Python file support with easily extensible operator framework
Multi-timezone scheduling visibility with customizable Jinja2-based DAG generation and direct Composer deployment
Built-in SLA monitoring, failure alerting, and environment-aware configuration for Dev, Staging, and Production
forBusiness: Faster pipeline onboarding by moving from pipeline definition to production-ready deployment in minutes instead of days.
Prevents broken workflows through built-in validation, dependency checks, and cycle detection
Ensures standardized pipelines with consistent scheduling, monitoring, and deployment practices
Simplifies maintenance using reusable templates, external SQL, and modular Python logic
Built-in governance with automatic SLA tracking, validation, and alerting mechanisms
Faster Cloud Composer deployment with production-ready DAG generation and minimal setup effort
